inputs.label: Oxygen Percentage (FO2)
inputs.businessContext: Oxygen percentage in the breathing nitrox gas. Usually between 21-40%.

businessContext_i18n.en: Oxygen percentage in the breathing nitrox gas. Typically between 21-40%.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Solunan nitroks gazındaki oksijen yüzdesi. Genellikle %21-40 arasındadır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Sauerstoffanteil im Atemgas. Üblicherweise zwischen 21% und 40%.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage d'oxygène dans le gaz nitrox respiré. Généralement entre 21 et 40 %.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de oxígeno en el gas nitroxe respirado. Generalmente entre 21-40%.
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة الأكسجين في غاز النيتروكس المستنشق. عادة بين 21-40%.

inputs.label: Working PO2
inputs.businessContext: Maximum partial pressure of oxygen during the working phase. Standard is 1.4 bar.

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum partial pressure of oxygen during working phase. Standard is 1.4 bar.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çalışma safhasında maksimum kısmi oksijen basıncı. Standart olarak 1.4 bar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximaler Sauerstoffpartialdruck während der Arbeitsphase. Standardmäßig 1,4 bar.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pression partielle maximale d'oxygène en phase de travail. Standard à 1,4 bar.
businessContext_i18n.es: Presión parcial máxima de oxígeno durante la fase de trabajo. Estándar 1.4 bar.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الحد الأقصى لضغط الأكسجين الجزئي أثناء مرحلة العمل. المعيار هو 1.4 بار.

inputs.label: Dekompresyon PO2
inputs.businessContext: Maximum allowable partial pressure of oxygen during decompression stops. Usually 1.6 bar.

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum allowable partial pressure of oxygen at decompression stops. Typically 1.6 bar.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dekompresyon duraklarında izin verilen maksimum kısmi oksijen basıncı. Genellikle 1.6 bar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximal zulässiger Sauerstoffpartialdruck während Dekompressionsstopps. Üblicherweise 1,6 bar.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pression partielle maximale d'oxygène autorisée lors des paliers de décompression. Généralement 1,6 bar.
businessContext_i18n.es: Presión parcial máxima de oxígeno permitida en las paradas de descompresión. Generalmente 1.6 bar.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الحد الأقصى المسموح به لضغط الأكسجين الجزئي أثناء توقفات تخفيف الضغط. عادة 1.6 بار.

inputs.label: Actual Depth
inputs.businessContext: Actual dive depth for equivalent air depth (EAD) calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Actual dive depth for equivalent air depth (EAD) calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Eşdeğer hava derinliği (EAD) hesaplaması için gerçek dalış derinliği.
businessContext_i18n.de: Tatsächliche Tauchtiefe zur Berechnung der äquivalenten Lufttiefe (EAD).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Profondeur réelle de plongée pour le calcul de la profondeur d'air équivalente (EAD).
businessContext_i18n.es: Profundidad real de inmersión para el cálculo de la profundidad equivalente de aire (EAD).
businessContext_i18n.ar: العمق الفعلي للغوص لحساب عمق الهواء المكافئ (EAD).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
